meaning: n.靠妓女为生的人,为妓女拉客的人,男妓 Ponce 庞塞[拉丁美洲波多黎各岛南部港市]
examples: Ponce was not a man to wast time in any undertaking.
Ponce was not a man to waste time in any undertaking.
Ponce was as heartless and unfeeling as any wild beast.
Demand is high and the waiting list includes some 80 people, says Mr. Ponce Jr.
However, historians now believe that Ponce de Leon landed near Melbourne Beach, about 150 miles south.
